item.name: Dodo Horn
item.description: This horn of bone emits a dissonant honk that, for no readily apparent reason, summons a dodo to your side.

mount.name: Dodo
mount.action: Summon forth your noble dodo─hopefully not the last one in existence.
mount.description: For centuries people of the Far East believed the dodo lost─the cloudkin hunted to extinction by poachers who would use its feathers for petticoats and its eggs for cheesy omelettes. The recent discovery of a nest in the upper echelons of Heaven–on–High, however, has given naturalists hope that the species may still endure.
mount.tooltip:
Those are some interestin'-lookin'
dodos ye've got there.
- Jacke
